emails.subject: FW: Azurix 2002 Plan Review
emails.body: FW: Azurix 2002 Plan Review When is Stan available? Probably will take no more than 2 hours.

emails.subject: RE: Azurix 2002 Plan Review
emails.body: RE: Azurix 2002 Plan Review Stan's day just opened up for this Thursday the 4th, or we could do 2:30 to 5:00PM on Monday, October 29, or 2:30 to 5:00PM on Tuesday, October 30. Otherwise, that's it. Please advise asap.

emails.subject: FW:   Azurix 2002 Plan Review
emails.body: FW: Azurix 2002 Plan Review Is this ok?

emails.subject: RE:   Azurix 2002 Plan Review
emails.body: RE: Azurix 2002 Plan Review This works great. Will you confirm this with all appropriate individuals and advise them this meeting will be held in Stan's office? Thanks!
